The minor advisor will conﬁrm that each portfolio meets these minimum requirements.

Notes:

1. Following university policy, English majors may count two Digital

Storytelling and Poetics minor courses toward both the requirements for the English major and the Digital Storytelling and Poetics minor.

2. Students must be accepted into the minor no later than the start of the semester before the semester in which they plan to graduate.
